nasb.text: Then the Lord spoke to you from the midst of the fire; you heard the sound of words, but you saw no form—only a voice.

esv.text: Then the Lord spoke to you out of the midst of the fire. You heard the sound of words, but saw no form; there was only a voice.

cnv.text: 耶和華從火中對你們說話；你們只聽見聲音，卻沒有看見形象；只有聲音，

ccb.text: 耶和华在火焰中对你们说话，你们只听见祂的声音，却看不见祂的形象。
